zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Poyntz於1359年6月11日出生在英國賀福爾姆 代可其時，他的父親Sir John Poyntz50歲，母親Elizabeth de Clanvowe45歲。他於1389年3月之前與Katherine FitzNichol結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1439年6月15日在英國格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓享年80歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾易隆 阿克頓。

nameMeanings.name: Poyntz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Points
meanings: from the Old French personal name Ponz, Ponce, from Latin Pontius (see Ponce ).

habitational name from any of several places called Ponts (such as those in Manche and in Seine-Maritime, Normandy), from Latin pontes ‘bridges’. This name has been established since the 13th century in Ireland, where it appears as Pounce and Pounche, and is Gaelicized as Púinse.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Poyntz was born on 11 June 1359, in Much Dewchurch, Herefordshire, England, his father, Sir John Poyntz, was 50 and his mother, Elizabeth de Clanvowe, was 45. He married Katherine FitzNichol before March 1389. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 15 June 1439, in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Poyntz est né le 11 juin 1359, à Much Dewchurch, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Poyntz, avait 50 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Clanvowe, avait 45 ans. Il a épousé Katherine FitzNichol avant mars 1389. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1439, à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Poyntz am 11. Juni 1359 in Much Dewchurch, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Poyntz 50 und seine Mutter Elizabeth de Clanvowe 45. Er hat vor März 1389 Katherine FitzNichol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1439 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England und wurde in Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, England begraben.

Lui sposato Katherine FitzNichol prima del marzo 1389. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Robert Poyntzが1359年6月11日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアムチ デウチャーチで生まれた時，父Sir John Poyntzは50歳，母Elizabeth de Clanvoweは45歳であった。1389年3月以前にKatherine FitzNicholと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1439年6月15日にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンで80歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアイロン アクトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Poyntz(이)가 1359년 6월 11일 영국 허퍼드실르 무치 데wc후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Poyntz(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth de Clanvowe(은)는 45세였다. 그는 1389년 3월 이전 Katherine FitzNichol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1439년 6월 15일 영국 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르 이런 악턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Poyntz nasceu em 11 de junho de 1359, em Much Dewchurch, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Poyntz, tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Clanvowe, tinha 45 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine FitzNichol antes março de 1389. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 15 de junho de 1439, em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Iron Acton, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Poyntz родился 11 июня 1359 г. в местности муч дючурч, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Poyntz было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Clanvowe, 45. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine FitzNichol перед марта 1389 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 15 июня 1439 г. в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности ирон актон, глоусестиршир, Англия.
